description: Create a custom TiddlyWiki ViewTemplate named 'ReleaseNotesTemplate' (tagged '$:/tags/ViewTemplate') that automatically appends categorized PRs to any tiddler tagged 'Release'. The template must display three markdown headings: '### 🚀 Features', '### 🐛 Bug Fixes', and '### ⚠️ Warnings'. Under each heading, dynamically list tiddlers tagged 'PR' and the corresponding category ('Feature', 'Bug', or 'Warning') where the 'target-release' field matches the title of the current 'Release' tiddler. Format each PR as a bullet point with a link to the PR followed by the author (e.g., `* <$link/> by {{!!author}}`). Verify the implementation by creating a tiddler titled 'v18.2.0' tagged 'Release' with the body text 'This is the June release.' and confirming the categorized PRs appear automatically without being hardcoded.
